hero.subtitle: Neutral Logistics Operator
hero.title: Connecting the world
hero.description: We turn complex logistics into seamless solutions

we_are.title: About Us
we_are.description: We are a Neutral Logistics Operator (NLO) with over 30 years of experience in the market.
we_are.description_full: We provide comprehensive logistics solutions that include ocean, air, and land transportation, as well as warehousing and cargo insurance services, adapting to the needs of our clients and each market.

offices.title: Offices
offices.description: Offices in every country, local teams, and one shared vision: connecting markets and opportunities throughout the region.

msl_group.title: About MSL Group
msl_group.description: We are part of MSL Group, a global business group with brands present in the Americas and the Caribbean, Europe, and Africa.

cta.title: We help you move your cargo around the world!

who_we_are.description: We are a Neutral Logistics Operator (NLO) with over 30 years of experience in the market. We provide comprehensive logistics solutions that include ocean, air, and land transportation, as well as warehousing and cargo insurance services.

our_history.title: We began operations in 1995 in Argentina as a neutral ocean consolidator. Since then, we have followed a path of steady growth, always attentive to market opportunities and the context of each country.
our_history.description: Over time, we expanded our presence across South America, diversified our services, and incorporated new modes of transportation to meet the demands of a constantly evolving industry.
our_history.description_continued: Throughout these years, our growth has been guided by an unwavering principle: neutrality — a core value that defines our identity and continues to accompany us in every step of our evolution.

regional_reach.title: Our numbers
regional_reach.description: We are a neutral logistics operator with strong presence throughout the South American region

header.title: Services
header.description: Our network of offices, strategic alliances, and agents worldwide allows us to provide global coverage with efficient end-to-end management.

slider.text: Industry expertise • Operational excellence • Neutrality guaranteed • Personalized customer service • Global reach

info.title: At MSL, we provide comprehensive logistics solutions tailored to each client's needs and the demands of the entire supply chain.
info.nlo_description: As part of MSL Group, we operate under the concept of an NLO (Neutral Logistics Operator), ensuring neutrality in every operation and delivering a reliable, professional, and personalized service.

ocean.title: Ocean
ocean.description: With over 30 years of experience, maritime transport remains our core business. We offer import and export services, with connections through strategic hubs in Latin America and around the world.
ocean.lcl: LCL (Less than Container Load): a flexible option for consolidated shipments, optimizing time and cost.
ocean.fcl: FCL (Full Container Load): an efficient solution for full shipments, with personalized tracking and a specialized management team.

air.title: Air
air.description: When time is critical, our air freight solutions ensure speed and safety.
air.full_description: Thanks to our global network and the strength of MSL Group, we manage air shipments in major markets, providing full coverage from pickup to final delivery. Our experience guarantees reliable, flexible, and tailored options for every need.

truck.title: Truck
truck.description: Land transport complements our multimodal offering.
truck.full_description: We provide FTL (Full Truckload) and LTL (Less than Truckload) services, as well as express deliveries, airport pickups, and handling of special or hazardous cargo (ADR).

warehousing.title: Warehousing
warehousing.description: We offer our own and partner warehouses in strategic locations, allowing us to provide LCL and FCL consolidation services, adapting to the requirements of each operation.
warehousing.full_description: We hold certifications and customs permits that ensure efficiency, safety, and regulatory compliance in every movement.

elogistics.title: E-Logistics
elogistics.description: Our E-Logistics unit offers solutions designed to optimize e-commerce operations by integrating technology, logistics processes, and digital distribution channels.
elogistics.full_description: Through a comprehensive approach, we connect every stage of the chain—from warehousing to final delivery—ensuring efficiency, traceability, and a seamless experience for both businesses and their end customers.

insurance.title: Cargo Insurance
insurance.description: We accompany our clients throughout the transport process with coverage that protects shipments against any eventuality.
insurance.full_description: Our specialized team handles documentation and provides advice on cargo management, including special or hazardous goods.

ar.name: Argentina
ar.last_description: Argentina is a key market on the east coast of South America.
ar.offices_description: Main office located in Buenos Aires, with three additional branches in the interior of the country: Mendoza, Rosario, and Córdoba.

ec.name: Ecuador
ec.last_description: Ecuador is strategic for our operations in the Pacific region.
ec.offices_description: Main office in Guayaquil, with two additional branches — one at Guayaquil Airport and another one in Quito.

ve.name: Venezuela
ve.last_description: Venezuela plays an important role in our operations across northern South America.
ve.offices_description: Main office in Caracas, with presence in the country's main ports: Puerto Cabello and La Guaira.

cl.name: Chile
cl.last_description: Chile is a strategic market for our operations in the South Pacific.
cl.offices_description: Santiago, Santiago Airport, Valparaíso, San Antonio, Arica, and Iquique.

py.name: Paraguay
py.last_description: Due to its geographic location, Paraguay is a key market for the implementation of multimodal services.

pe.name: Peru
pe.last_description: Peru is a key market on the Pacific coast.
pe.offices_description: Main office located in Lima, where all business units operate except for the Air division, which is based in the Lima Cargo Center – Callao. Additional offices in Paita and Mollendo.

bo.name: Bolivia
bo.description: Operations began in 2008, with inland import services from Argentina to La Paz.
bo.last_description: Bolivia is a growing market for our logistics operations.
bo.offices_description: Main office in Santa Cruz de la Sierra, with an additional office in La Paz.

co.name: Colombia
co.last_description: With access to both the Pacific and Atlantic oceans, Colombia holds a strategic position for international maritime trade.
co.offices_description: Main office in Bogotá, with presence in Cartagena, Medellín, Buenaventura, and at Bogotá Airport.

br.name: Brazil
br.last_description: Brazil is one of the largest and most important markets in Latin America.
br.offices_description: Main office located in São Paulo, with five additional branches in Santos, Campinas, Rio de Janeiro, Itajaí, and Porto Alegre.

uy.name: Uruguay
uy.last_description: With our office in Montevideo, we serve the logistics needs of the country.
uy.offices_description: With our office in Montevideo, we serve the logistics needs of the country.

header.title: Contact
header.description: Send us your inquiry and we will get back to you shortly.

work_with_us.title: Work with us
work_with_us.subtitle: Submit your CV to join the MSL team.
work_with_us.description: We believe that talent, innovation, and commitment drive growth. If you share our vision, apply to connect with us.

form.terms: I accept the terms and conditions of the website.

footer.icargo_description: We are part of the ICargo alliance
